appraisal_events.evidence: Mme Verdurin lui dit que Mme de Cambremer se moquait de lui, qu’il était la fable de son salon, qu’il allait déshonorer sa vieillesse, compromettre sa situation dans l’enseignement; elle l’emporta, Brichot cessa d’aller à Féterne.
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Verdurin delivers a humiliating indictment to Brichot to tear him away from Mme de Cambremer. The text recounts her effective intervention and the ensuing rupture.

status_effects.explanation: Under the pressure and reproaches from Mme Verdurin, Brichot gives up Féterne and sinks into such deep sorrow that his vision suffers; his emotional position is significantly weakened.
